name: Coin Pickup
description: a bright, short metallic jingle played when the player picks up a gold coin
usage: Play on gold_coin / gold_ingot pickup and shop sales.

ai.prompt: A single gold coin collected: a bright, clean metallic ting with a fast attack and a short shimmering ring-out, small and satisfying. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
